note: Agent-readable metadata, companion to harbor.tokens.json. The colour (semantic role) tier and the typography tier (type composites + weight roles) carry the rich schema; the primitive tier a simplified set + colour-scale `intent` and `aliased_by` (the reverse index — which tokens resolve to it, TRANSITIVELY, so the two-hop weight chain composite→role→numeric is visible). `aliased_by` is recomputed from the token tree on every build (authoritative at build time, never hand-maintained — it cannot drift). All fields generated and contract-true.
